The '''Bothan droid disruptor''' was a weapon crafted by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] for use by their espionage agents who might face [[Droid/Legends|droid]] guards. These weapons made quick work of any droid obstacles by having the ability to penetrate some defenses that [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire could not.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
